title: Senior Plant Manager at Nestle India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Nestle India
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!
